Line 2025:                     <p>Supplier understands, under 15 U.S.C. 645(d), any person who misrepresents a firm’s status that is small, HUBZone small, small disadvantaged, service-disabled veteran-owned small, economically disadvantaged women-owned small, or women-owned small eligible under the WOSB Program in order to obtain a contract to be awarded under the preference programs established pursuant to section 8, 9, 15, 31 and 36 of the Small Business Act or any other provision of Federal law that specifically references section 8(d) for a definition of program eligibility, shall (i) be punished by imposition of fine, imprisonment, or both; (ii) be subject to administrative remedies, including suspension and debarment; and (iii) be ineligible for participation in programs conducted under the authority of the Act (FAR 52.219-1(d)(2)).</p>

Line 3064: WriteLiteral("\"/> B. Supplier certifies, to the best of its knowledge and belief that your firm" +
Line 3065: " and/or any of its Principals <b>ARE NOT</b> presently debarred, suspended, prop" +
Line 3066: "osed for debarment, or declared ineligible for the award of contracts by any Fed" +
Line 3067: "eral agency.</p>\r\n\r\n    </div>\r\n\r\n    <div>\r\n\r\n        <p><b> 9. <i>CERTIFICATE " +
Line 3068: "OF INDEPENDENT PRICE DETERMINATION (<a href=\'https://www.acquisition.gov/far/cur" +
Line 3069: "rent/html/52_200_206.html#wp1137583 \'>FAR 52-023-2</a>)</i></b></p>\r\n\r\n        <" +
Line 3070: "p>A. Supplier certifies that:</p>\r\n\r\n        <p style=\"margin-left:40px\">1.  The" +
Line 3071: " prices in all offers to Honeywell have been arrived at independently, without, " +
Line 3072: "for the purpose of restricting competition, any consultation, communication or a" +
Line 3073: "greement with any other offeror or competitor relating to (i) those prices, (ii)" +
Line 3074: " the intention to submit an offer, or (iii) the methods or factors used to calcu" +
Line 3075: "late the prices offered.</p>\r\n\r\n        <p style=\"margin-left:40px\">2. The price" +
Line 3076: "s in all offers to Honeywell have not been and will not be knowingly disclosed b" +
Line 3077: "y the offeror, directly or indirectly, to any other offeror or competitor before" +
Line 3078: " bid opening (in the case of a sealed bid solicitation) or contract award (in th" +
Line 3079: "e case of a negotiated solicitation) unless otherwise required by law; and</p>\r\n" +
Line 3080: "\r\n        <p style=\"margin-left:40px\">3. No attempt has been made or will be mad" +
Line 3081: "e by the offeror to induce any other concern to submit or not to submit an offer" +
Line 3082: " for the purpose of restricting competition.</p>\r\n\r\n        <p>B. Each signature" +
Line 3083: " on an offer to Honeywell is considered to be a certification by the signatory t" +
Line 3084: "hat the signatory:</p>\r\n\r\n        <p style=\"margin-left:40px\">1. Is the person i" +
Line 3085: "n the offeror\'s organization responsible for determining the prices being offere" +
Line 3086: "d in any bid or proposal, and that the signatory has not participated and will n" +
Line 3087: "ot participate in any action contrary to subparagraphs A.1 through A.3 of this S" +
Line 3088: "ection; or</p>\r\n\r\n        <p style=\"margin-left:40px\">2. (i) Has been authorized" +
Line 3089: ", in writing, to act as agent for the principals involved in certifying that tho" +
Line 3090: "se principals have not participated, and will not participate in any action cont" +
Line 3091: "rary to subparagraphs A.1 through A.3 of this Section; (ii) As an authorized age" +
Line 3092: "nt, does certify that such principals have not participated, and will not partic" +
Line 3093: "ipate, in any action contrary to subparagraphs A.1 through A.3 of this Section; " +
Line 3094: "and (iii) As an agent, has not personally participated, and will not participate" +
Line 3095: ", in any action contrary to subparagraphs A.1 through A.3 of this Section.</p>\r\n" +
Line 3096: "\r\n        <p>C. If <i>SUPPLIER</i> deletes or modifies subparagraph A.2 of this " +
Line 3097: "Section, Supplier must furnish with its offer a signed statement setting forth i" +
Line 3098: "n detail the circumstances of the disclosure.</p>\r\n\r\n        <p>\r\n            <b" +
Line 3099: " style =\"margin-left:40px\"><input type=\"checkbox\" /> YES </b>\r\n            <b st" +
Line 3100: "yle =\"margin-left:20px\"><input type=\"checkbox\"/> NO </b>\r\n            <b style =" +
Line 3101: "\"margin-left:20px\">If NO, comment required: <input type=\"text\" style=\"width:200p" +
Line 3102: "x; height:20px\"/></b>\r\n        </p>\r\n\r\n    </div> \r\n\r\n    <div>\r\n\r\n        <p><b" +
Line 3103: ">10. <i>CERTIFICATION REGARDING PAYMENTS TO INFLUENCE CERTAIN FEDERAL TRANSACTIO" +
Line 3104: "NS (<a href=\'https://www.acquisition.gov/far/current/html/52_200_206.html#wp1137" +
Line 3105: "568\'>FAR 52-203-11</a>)</i></b></p>\r\n\r\n        <p><i>SUPPLIER</i> certifies, to " +
Line 3106: "the best of its knowledge and belief, NO Federal appropriated funds have been pa" +
Line 3107: "id or will be paid to any person to influence or attempt to influence certain Go" +
Line 3108: "vernment officials to award or modify a Federal contract.</p>\r\n\r\n        <p>\r\n  " +
Line 3109: "          <b style =\"margin-left:40px\"><input type=\"checkbox\" /> YES </b>\r\n     " +
Line 3110: "       <b style =\"margin-left:20px\"><input type=\"checkbox\"/> NO </b>\r\n        </" +
Line 3111: "p>\r\n\r\n    </div>\r\n\r\n    <div>\r\n\r\n        <p><b>11. <i>DISCLOSURE REGARDING PAYME" +
Line 3112: "NTS TO INFLUENCE CERTAIN FEDERAL TRANSACTIONS (<a href=\'https://www.acquisition." +
Line 3113: "gov/far/current/html/52_200_206.html#wp1137568\'>FAR 52-203-11</a>)</i></b></p>\r\n" +
Line 3114: "\r\n        <p><i>SUPPLIER</i> agrees to submit to Honeywell OMB Standard Form LLL" +
Line 3115: " prior to any contract award of $150,000 or greater when supplier has paid or wi" +
Line 3116: "ll pay Federal appropriated funds to influence certain Government officials to a" +
Line 3117: "ward or modify a Federal contract.</p>\r\n\r\n        <p>\r\n            <b style =\"ma" +

Line 3121: "0px\"/></b>\r\n        </p>\r\n\r\n    </div>\r\n\r\n    <br />\r\n    <br />\r\n    <br />\r\n  " +

Line 3123: "WITH DENIED PERSONS/DEBARRED PARTIES/SDN</i></b></p>\r\n\r\n        <p>To ensure com" +
Line 3124: "pliance of U.S. export laws, Honeywell does not conduct any business transaction" +
Line 3125: " with the \"Denied Persons List\" published by the U.S. Department of Commerce, th" +
Line 3126: "e \"Denied Parties List\" published by the Department of State and the \"Specially " +
Line 3127: "Designated Nationals\" list published by the Department of Treasury, Foreign Asse" +
Line 3128: "ts Control. Honeywell expects all suppliers and its sub-contractors to comply wi" +
Line 3129: "th these laws as well. Supplier agrees to include this requirement in lower-tier" +
Line 3130: " Purchase Orders and/or subcontracts. (You may view the U.S. Government web site" +
Line 3131: "s of the Agencies noted above to access their lists)\r\n\r\n        <p>\r\n           " +

Line 3200: "  <b style =\"margin-left:40px\"><input type=\"checkbox\" /> YES </b>\r\n            <" +
Line 3201: "b style =\"margin-left:20px\"><input type=\"checkbox\"/> NO </b>\r\n        </p>\r\n\r\n  " +
Line 3202: "  </div>\r\n\r\n    <div>\r\n\r\n        <p><b>15. <i>EXECUTIVE COMPENSATION AND FIRST-T" +
Line 3203: "IER SUBCONTRACT AWARDS REPORTING (<a href=\'https://www.acquisition.gov/far/curre" +
Line 3204: "nt/html/52_200_206.html#wp1137568\'>FAR 52-204-10</a>)</i></b></p>\r\n\r\n        <p>" +
Line 3205: "Does your firm file periodic reports on executive compensation under Section 13(" +
Line 3206: "a) or 15(d) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 (15 U.S.C. 78m(a), 78o(d)) or" +
Line 3207: " Section 6104 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986?</p>\r\n                    \r\n " +
Line 3208: "       <p>\r\n            <b style =\"margin-left:40px\"><input type=\"checkbox\" /> Y" +
Line 3209: "ES </b>\r\n            <b style =\"margin-left:20px\"><input type=\"checkbox\"/> NO </" +
Line 3210: "b>\r\n            <b style =\"margin-left:20px\">If NO, comment required: <input typ" +
Line 3211: "e=\"text\" style=\"width:200px; height:20px\"/></b>\r\n        </p>\r\n\r\n    </div>\r\n\r\n " +
Line 3212: "   <div>\r\n\r\n        <p><b>16. <i>CERTIFICATION REGARDINGPOLITICALCONTRIBUTIONS, " +
Line 3213: "FEES, AND COMMISSIONS (<a href=\'http://www.ecfr.gov/cgi-bin/text-idx?c=ecfr&SID=" +
Line 3214: "9f40509b0e3da13737d77a645b79f912&rgn=div5&view=text&node=22:1.0.1.13.67&idno=22\'" +
Line 3215: "> ITAR PART 130</a>)</i></b></p>\r\n\r\n        <p>Please note that 22 C.F.R.  130.1" +
Line 3216: "2(b) requires Supplier to respond to this section <b>within 20 days</b>, unless " +
Line 3217: "Supplier provides the information directly to the U.S. State Department in accor" +
Line 3218: "dance with 22 C.F.R.  130.12(c). U.S. law requires Honeywell to inform the Depar" +
Line 3219: "tment of State if we have not received a response within 25 days of this request" +
Line 3220: ". Additionally, 22 C.F.R.  130.14 requires Supplier to maintain the records upon" +
Line 3221: " which the information below is based for a minimum of five years from the date " +
Line 3222: "of the report. </p>\r\n\r\n        <p>A. <i>SUPPLIER</i> certifies it <b>SELLS</b> d" +
Line 3223: "efense articles, technical data, and/or defense services to Honeywell that are: " +
Line 3224: " (1) controlled for export under U.S. International Traffic in Arms Regulations " +
Line 3225: "(ITAR) (22 CFR Parts 120-130); (2) valued in an amount of $500,000 or greater; a" +
Line 3226: "nd (3) for delivery (or incorporation into another product for delivery) to, or " +
Line 3227: "for the use of, the armed forces of an international organization or a country o" +
Line 3228: "ther than the United States. </p>\r\n        \r\n        <p style =\"margin-left:20px" +
Line 3229: "\">\r\n            <b style =\"margin-left:40px\"><input type=\"checkbox\" /> YES </b>\r" +
Line 3230: "\n            <b style =\"margin-left:20px\"><input type=\"checkbox\"/> NO </b>\r\n    " +
Line 3231: "    </p>\r\n\r\n        <p> B. <i>SUPPLIER</i> certifies it has paid, offered to pay" +
Line 3232: ", or agreed to pay any “fees”, “commissions”, or “political contributions” as de" +
Line 3233: "fined in 22 CFR § 130.5 and 22 CFR § 130.6 in connection with the sale of defens" +
Line 3234: "e articles, technical data, and/or defense services to Honeywell. </p>\r\n        " +
Line 3235: "\r\n        <p style =\"margin-left:20px\">\r\n            <b style =\"margin-left:40px" +
Line 3236: "\"><input type=\"checkbox\" /> YES </b>\r\n            <b style =\"margin-left:20px\"><" +
Line 3237: "input type=\"checkbox\"/> NO </b>\r\n        </p>\r\n\r\n        <p><b><i style=\"color:r" +

Line 3245: "licitations, agreements, Purchase Orders, contracts, or subcontracts received fr" +
Line 3246: "om Honeywell, and shall be valid for the calendar year noted on page 1. If any c" +
Line 3247: "hanges to the above occur, Supplier will immediately notify a Honeywell Complian" +
Line 3248: "ce Officer, in writing, regarding its change in status.</p>\r\n\r\n    <table width=" +
